SKILLS.TITLE: Soft Skills
SKILLS.SUBTITLE: Beyond code, these human qualities make all the difference.

ANALYSIS.TITLE: Analytical mindset
ANALYSIS.DESC: Breaking down complex problems to extract insights and find relevant solutions.

PROBLEM_SOLVING.TITLE: Problem Solving
PROBLEM_SOLVING.DESC: 5 years of technical support forged a methodical and efficient approach to every challenge.

CURIOSITY.TITLE: Intellectual curiosity
CURIOSITY.DESC: Continuous learning: always watching the latest advances in AI and technology.

CREATIVITY.TITLE: Creativity
CREATIVITY.DESC: Designing original approaches to tackle both technical and business challenges.

BUSINESS.TITLE: Business thinking
BUSINESS.DESC: Understanding business stakes to align tech solutions with company objectives.

LEARNING.TITLE: Continuous learning
LEARNING.DESC: Successfully transitioning from IT support to AI through discipline and constant passion.

TECH_SKILLS.TITLE: Technical Skills
TECH_SKILLS.SUBTITLE: Technical skills acquired throughout my education.

ABOUT.TITLE: My journey
ABOUT.TEXT_1: With 5 years of experience in helpdesk & application support (level 1 & 2), I developed strong skills in analyzing, diagnosing and solving complex technical problems under pressure.
ABOUT.TEXT_2: This hands-on experience, combined with my AI Engineering training, allows me to approach artificial intelligence from both a technical and user-centric perspective.
ABOUT.TEXT_3: I am now building expertise in Machine Learning and LLM engineering (SFT/DPO fine-tuning, RAG, agents) with the goal of creating AI solutions with strong business impact.

PROJECTS.TITLE: My Projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Explore my academic and personal projects in AI and development.

PORTFOLIO.TITLE: Portfolio & RAG Assistant
PORTFOLIO.DESC: This website: an AI Engineer portfolio with an interactive mind map and a RAG chat assistant (ChromaDB + Mistral AI) that presents my projects to recruiters from real data. Angular frontend, FastAPI backend, containerized with Docker.

SENTINEL.TITLE: Sentinel — AI-Assisted Investigation
SENTINEL.DESC: AI-assisted investigation platform (work in progress). A chatbot that turns multilingual natural language into queries and smart inserts across any database type — relational, graph and vector. Target: journalists and investigators who need to connect facts quickly and feed multiple fit-for-purpose databases through reports.

STUDENT_1.TITLE: Medical Triage Chatbot
STUDENT_1.DESC: Bilingual emergency triage chatbot (Qwen3-1.7B). Fine-tuned with SFT + DPO (LoRA/Unsloth), DSPy-optimized prompts, served by vLLM on GPU. CI/CD with a blocking evaluation gate, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring, PostgreSQL, Docker.

NEUROVA.TITLE: Neurova — Brain Training
NEUROVA.DESC: Brain-training mobile app: 11 solo cognitive games (memory, spatial, words, logic) and 4 real-time multiplayer games over WebSocket. Server-authoritative Rust (Axum) backend, PostgreSQL/Redis, AdMob monetization + premium subscription. Launching August 1st on Android and iOS. A large part of the app was built with "vibe coding" (heavily AI-assisted development).

STUDENT_2.TITLE: Interactive AI Chess Coach
STUDENT_2.DESC: Intelligent agent (LangGraph) for opening training. Hybrid Lichess/Stockfish analysis, RAG on WikiChess via Milvus, and contextual YouTube suggestions.

MIND_MAP.TITLE: Mind Map
MIND_MAP.SUBTITLE: My AI Engineer journey across 15 projects. Click a project to reveal its missions, tech stack, soft skills and a highlight.
MIND_MAP.HINT: Click a project to expand it · Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan

P1.MISSIONS: Project myself into the program: define my work schedule, pick the collaboration tool with my mentor and understand what the curriculum expects.
P1.FACT: Structuring 15 projects like a timetable: real mental preparation to sustain a long-term training program.

P2.MISSIONS: Set up an AI environment and use a pre-trained model to segment clothing items on influencer pictures and analyze online fashion trends.

P3.MISSIONS: Predict the energy consumption of Seattle buildings: exploratory analysis, automated cleaning, feature scaling, model training and results summary.
P3.SOFT: Analytical rigor · Communication & making results accessible

P4.MISSIONS: Detect employee attrition: supervised classification on imbalanced HR data, data preparation and model evaluation.

P5.MISSIONS: Follow-up to P4: ship the attrition model to production. Secured API, database, automated tests and continuous deployment on Hugging Face Spaces.
P5.FACT: First end-to-end deployment: the turning point that made me autonomous on my personal projects.

P6.MISSIONS: Model a credit score (binary classification on banking data): deep EDA, hyperparameter optimization with Optuna, overfitting management and model lifecycle versioned with MLflow.
P6.SOFT: Analytical mindset (EDA, Optuna, MLflow) · Methodical approach
P6.FACT: These skills allowed me to show personal projects to my friends.

P7.MISSIONS: Design and deploy a RAG chatbot for cultural events: vector search, context-faithful generation, API and automated quality evaluation.

P8.MISSIONS: Follow-up to P6: industrialize the scoring system. Credit-decision dashboard, cloud API, automated deployment, full monitoring and drift analysis.
P8.FACT: Knowing how to keep a model and an API alive in production: I feel companies are strongly looking for this kind of skill.

P9.MISSIONS: Scope an AI product for an executive committee: analyze the need, identify opportunities, assess risks, plan, prototype feasibility and convince decision-makers.
P9.SOFT: Needs analysis · Communication & simplifying complexity · Risk management

P10.MISSIONS: Analyze brain MRI scans: semi-supervised labeling through embedding clustering, then supervised classification with a CNN.
P10.FACT: Computer vision is what drew me to this program in the first place: this was the project I was waiting for.

P11.MISSIONS: Train a DQN agent on LunarLander and expose it through an API with interactive dashboards and episode visualization.

P12.MISSIONS: Build a multimodal ETL pipeline (text + image) from RSS feeds, orchestrated with Airflow, with quality, latency and cost KPIs.

P13.MISSIONS: Build a POC of a chess-opening coaching agent: orchestrate opening theory, a tactical engine, a RAG knowledge base and video recommendations within a single decision graph.
P13.FACT: The project that changed my view of the job: beyond support chatbots, we can build agents that genuinely assist professionals in their work.

P14.MISSIONS: Develop a POC medical triage agent: dataset building and anonymization, SFT + DPO fine-tuning, optimized GPU serving and automated cloud deployment.
P14.FACT: This project's revelation: the dataset is the heart of the work. After that preparation stage, everything else felt almost secondary.

P15.MISSIONS: Design this portfolio and its RAG assistant that presents my projects to recruiters from real data.
P15.FACT: The portfolio is itself a technical project: this website ships with its own RAG chatbot.

CONTACT.TITLE: Let's Talk
CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Have a project idea? An opportunity? Feel free to reach out.
